hero.title: Discover Your Craft & Build Your Future
hero.subtitle: An Algerian platform for discovering professional aptitudes and learning in-demand crafts.

test.title: Analyze Your Aptitudes
test.discover_path: Discover the most suitable career path for you.

home.how_it_works_desc: Simple steps to find your ideal professional path and start training.
home.step1_desc: Take a short test that analyzes your aptitudes, physical abilities, and preferred work nature.
home.step2_desc: Our smart system suggests the top 3 crafts that perfectly match your personality.
home.step3_desc: Find vocational training centers in your province or start initial learning right here.
home.cta_title: A craft in hand is security from poverty
home.cta_point2: Real opportunities to start an supported business.
home.cta_point3: Recognized state diploma in vocational training.

crafts.directory_subtitle: Discover the available and in-demand professional fields in Algeria, with details on training duration and career prospects.

learn.space_subtitle: Your professional journey starts here. Learn basic principles, watch real-world applications, and practice yourself to prepare for your vocational training.
learn.unlock_badges: Complete paths to unlock professional badges
learn.journey_desc: Complete the levels step by step to unlock your final badge and be ready for apprenticeship.
learn.final_project_desc: After completing all levels, the final project will unlock for you to apply your skills and earn your digital badge.
learn.question: Question

sewing.start_msg: Welcome to the world of sewing! A journey of a thousand stitches begins with patience and precision. Are you ready to design your first piece?
sewing.lesson_done: Creative! You've passed an important lesson. Every stitch brings you closer to becoming a master tailor.
sewing.quiz_error: It's okay, even the most skilled tailors need to unpick and resew sometimes. Try again with more focus.
sewing.stage_done: What energy! You've completed a full stage. Tidy your tools and get ready for what's next; you're moving with confidence.
sewing.graduation: Congratulations, hero! You now possess the basics of a noble craft. Algeria is proud of its new artisans like you. Don't stop here, creativity has no limits!

admin.dashboard_subtitle: Tools for adding new learning paths and smart content generation.
admin.prompt_hint: Copy this text and paste it into your preferred LLM (like ChatGPT or Claude) to get the structured JSON path, then upload the file to the database.
admin.enter_name: // Enter craft name and click generate to see prompt here
admin.placeholder_desc: Explain the nature of the craft and basic skills...

about.hero_title: Hirfati Platform – Crafted with Passion, Supervised by Professionals
about.hero_subtitle: Built for Algerian youth, guided by academic excellence
about.founder_quote: I believed that Algerian youth could make a difference if they had the right tool. That's why 'Hirfati' was born, not just as a website, but as a companion for every young person seeking a future in the craft they love. Every line of its code, and every lesson in it, is an investment in a skilled Algerian hand.
about.story_p1: The idea of "Hirfati" was born from the genuine need to guide Algerian youth towards crafts and trades, transforming them into successful career paths. The goal was to bridge passion and training in a modern digital way.
about.story_p2: Through the efforts of founder Terki Abdelhak and the support of his colleague Djamel Boudehedje, the idea became a comprehensive platform aimed at simplifying access to vocational information for every Algerian.
about.terki_desc: Software engineer, who sees technology as a bridge to advance vocational training.
about.djamel_desc: The project's right hand, and the silent engine ensuring the platform's continuity.
about.supervision_desc: Under the supervision of this academic edifice, we ensure that all 'Hirfati' content complies with national pedagogical standards, preparing learners for the real job market. Proud of our partnership.
about.ack_msg: Our sincere thanks go to the center's teachers and the early contributors who believed in the future of Algerian craftsmanship.

footer.expert_msg: Are you an expert craftsperson? Join us and share your expertise with the next generation.

comparator.title: Craft Comparator
comparator.select_two: Please select two crafts to compare.

reviews.title: Learner Reviews
reviews.must_complete: You must complete 70% of the course to leave a review.
reviews.no_reviews: No reviews yet. Be the first to review!

referral.title: Platform Friend Badge
referral.desc: Inviting friends earns you points and badges. Spread the good!

training_centers.title: Training Centers
training_centers.subtitle: Find the nearest professional training center
training_centers.results_empty: No training centers found matching your criteria. Try adjusting the filters.

training_modes.title: Vocational Training Modes in Algeria
training_modes.subtitle: From apprenticeship to distance learning, discover all the available options to get a certified professional degree.
training_modes.cta_desc: Take our aptitude test to discover the most suitable crafts and training modes for you.

apprenticeship.title: Apprenticeship Training
apprenticeship.desc: Combines theoretical study in the center and practical training within an economic institution, culminating in an apprenticeship contract that guarantees you a wage while learning.
apprenticeship.benefits_val: Monthly salary, practical experience, employment priority.
apprenticeship.contract_val: Contract between the apprentice, the employing institution, and the center.

presentiel.title: Initial Residential Training
presentiel.desc: The classic mode of study in a vocational training center, with full-day or half-day attendance, with practice in workshops.
presentiel.target: Youth under 25, middle or high school graduates.
presentiel.duration_val: From 6 to 24 months depending on the specialty.

continue.title: Continuous Vocational Training
continue.desc: Short or long courses to develop skills or acquire new ones, aimed at employees and workers wishing to improve their level.
continue.benefits_val: Can be funded by the FNAC fund.

evening.title: Evening Classes
evening.desc: The same residential training programs but with evening timing, suitable for those who work during the day or have family commitments.
evening.link_text: Find a center with evening classes

distance.title: Distance Vocational Training
distance.desc: Learn from home online with teacher follow-up, and get a certified state degree. Supervised by the National Center for Distance Vocational Training (CNFEPD).

disclaimer.title: Legal Disclaimer
disclaimer.full: Disclaimer: The "Hirfati" platform is an independent educational initiative and is not affiliated with any official government entity. Most technical and pedagogical information related to crafts, vocational training, and apprenticeship paths is sourced or adapted from official Algerian references, notably the Ministry of Vocational Training and Education, the Directory of Professional Branches, and the National Directory of Specialties and Programs. The platform aims to facilitate access to this information and present it in a simplified educational format for Algerian youth. It does not, in any way, replace consultation with the competent official institutions.
disclaimer.short: Hirfati is an independent educational platform. Information is adapted from official vocational training and apprenticeship sources.
disclaimer.craft: The information above is adapted from official Algerian vocational training sources.
